patched_rule.title: Lung Cancer Screening with LDCT — Coverage Criteria
patched_rule.description: Medicare coverage of annual lung cancer screening with LDCT when all specified criteria are met.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must be age 55 – 77 years.

span.text: The beneficiary must be age 55 – 77 years.

documentation.text: The beneficiary must have a tobacco smoking history of at least 30 pack-years.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must have a tobacco smoking history of at least 30 pack-years.

span.text: The beneficiary must have a tobacco smoking history of at least 30 pack-years.

of.reason: Pack-year smoking history is not documented; cannot confirm the required minimum of 30 pack-years.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must have a tobacco smoking history of at least 30 pack-years.

span.text: The beneficiary must have a tobacco smoking history of at least 30 pack-years.

documentation.text: The beneficiary must be a current smoker or one who has quit smoking within the last 15 years.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must be a current smoker or one who has quit smoking within the last 15 years.

span.text: The beneficiary must be a current smoker or one who has quit smoking within the last 15 years.

of.reason: Smoking status (current smoker vs. quit within 15 years) is not documented; cannot confirm eligibility.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must be a current smoker or one who has quit smoking within the last 15 years.

span.text: The beneficiary must be a current smoker or one who has quit smoking within the last 15 years.

documentation.text: The beneficiary must be asymptomatic (no signs or symptoms of lung cancer).

citations.quote: The beneficiary must be asymptomatic (no signs or symptoms of lung cancer).

span.text: The beneficiary must be asymptomatic (no signs or symptoms of lung cancer).

of.reason: Asymptomatic status is not documented; cannot confirm this mandatory criterion.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must be asymptomatic (no signs or symptoms of lung cancer).

span.text: The beneficiary must be asymptomatic (no signs or symptoms of lung cancer).

documentation.text: The beneficiary must receive a written order for LDCT lung cancer screening during a lung cancer screening counseling and shared decision-making visit (HCPCS G0296) prior to the first screening.

citations.quote: The beneficiary must receive a written order for LDCT lung cancer screening during a lung cancer screening counseling and shared decision-making visit (HCPCS G0296) prior to the first screening.

span.text: The beneficiary must receive a written order for LDCT lung cancer screening during a lung cancer screening counseling and shared decision-making visit (HCPCS G0296) prior to the first screening.

of.reason: SDM visit is documented but presence of the required written order is not confirmed; cannot verify compliance.

citations.quote: Covered procedure codes include HCPCS G0296 (counseling/SDM visit) and HCPCS G0297 (LDCT lung cancer screening).

span.text: Covered procedure codes include HCPCS G0296 (counseling/SDM visit) and HCPCS G0297 (LDCT lung cancer screening).

citations.quote: Medicare covers screening for lung cancer with low dose computed tomography (LDCT) once per year when all of the following criteria are met:

span.text: Medicare covers screening for lung cancer with low dose computed tomography (LDCT) once per year when all of the following criteria are met:

changelog.change: Fixed age minimum from 50 to 55 to match policy text 'age 55 – 77 years' (was an incorrect/erroneous value not supported by source).
changelog.cite: The beneficiary must be age 55 – 77 years.
changelog.reason: Original rule cited '55–77' text but encoded min:50, contradicting its own citation; corrected to match cited source, resolving ADV-014 and ADV-015 boundary failures.

changelog.change: Wrapped pack-years, smoking-status, asymptomatic, and sdm-visit-order documentation leaves each in an OR with a manual_review branch for missing/undocumented data.
changelog.cite: Policy requires each criterion but is silent on how to treat missing/ambiguous documentation.
changelog.reason: Tests ADV-007, ADV-009, ADV-011, ADV-012 expect 'review' outcome when documentation is absent rather than an outright 'deny'; policy does not specify auto-deny on missing documentation, so manual_review is the safe non-invented branch.

unresolved.issue: ADV-004 (exactly 30 pack-years, quit 10 years ago) and ADV-006 (quit 14.9 years ago) failures appear to stem from evaluation/execution logic (boundary inclusivity for 'at least 30' and 'within 15 years'), not from the rule's condition structure — the documentation leaves as written already state 'at least 30 pack-years' and 'within the last 15 years' which are inclusive phrasings supporting exact-boundary approval. No rule change made since policy text already supports inclusive boundaries; flagged for evaluator/engine boundary-handling review.
unresolved.reason: Cannot patch evaluation semantics via rule condition alone without inventing new leaf semantics not present in source text.
